params.name: CyberVender Medal
params.description: CyberVender is the home planet of all vending robots, where the Catbots and Dogbots are engaged in a war. For the sake of their own justice and interests, both factions want to dominate the planet. Hopefully, their strife won't affect the vending robot here!
params.ss1:
Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail HP +20
Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
params.ss2:

Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
params.ss3:

Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
